name: Bell State (Cirq)
code:
import cirq
q0, q1 = cirq.LineQubit.range(2)
circuit = cirq.Circuit([
    cirq.H(q0),
    cirq.CNOT(q0, q1),
    cirq.measure(q0, q1, key='result')
])
print(circuit)

name: Bell State (Qiskit)
code:
from qiskit import QuantumCircuit
qc = QuantumCircuit(2, 2)
qc.h(0)
qc.cx(0, 1)
qc.measure([0, 1], [0, 1])

name: Bell State (PennyLane)
GHZ State (Cirq)
code:
import cirq
qubits = cirq.LineQubit.range(3)
circuit = cirq.Circuit([
    cirq.H(qubits[0]),
    cirq.CNOT(qubits[0], qubits[1]),
    cirq.CNOT(qubits[1], qubits[2]),
    cirq.measure(*qubits, key='result')
])
print(circuit)

name: GHZ State (Qiskit)
code:
from qiskit import QuantumCircuit
qc = QuantumCircuit(3, 3)
qc.h(0)
qc.cx(0, 1)
qc.cx(1, 2)
qc.measure([0, 1, 2], [0, 1, 2])

name: GHZ State (PennyLane)
Quantum Teleportation (Cirq)
code:
import cirq
msg, alice, bob = cirq.LineQubit.range(3)
circuit = cirq.Circuit()
circuit.append(cirq.X(msg))
circuit.append([cirq.H(alice), cirq.CNOT(alice, bob)])
circuit.append([cirq.CNOT(msg, alice), cirq.H(msg)])
circuit.append(cirq.measure(msg, alice, key='alice_bits'))
circuit.append([cirq.CNOT(alice, bob), cirq.CZ(msg, bob)])
circuit.append(cirq.measure(bob, key='bob_bit'))

name: Quantum Teleportation (Qiskit)
code:
from qiskit import QuantumCircuit
qc = QuantumCircuit(3, 3)
qc.x(0)
qc.h(1)
qc.cx(1, 2)
qc.cx(0, 1)
qc.h(0)
qc.measure([0, 1], [0, 1])
qc.cx(1, 2)
qc.cz(0, 2)
qc.measure(2, 2)

name: Quantum Teleportation (PennyLane)
Deutsch-Jozsa (Cirq)
code:
import cirq
n = 3
qubits = cirq.LineQubit.range(n + 1)
circuit = cirq.Circuit()
circuit.append(cirq.X(qubits[-1]))
circuit.append(cirq.H.on_each(*qubits))
circuit.append(cirq.CNOT(qubits[0], qubits[-1]))
circuit.append(cirq.H.on_each(*qubits[:-1]))
circuit.append(cirq.measure(*qubits[:-1], key='result'))

name: Deutsch-Jozsa (Qiskit)
code:
from qiskit import QuantumCircuit
n = 3
qc = QuantumCircuit(n + 1, n)
qc.x(n)
qc.h(range(n + 1))
qc.cx(0, n)
qc.h(range(n))
qc.measure(range(n), range(n))

name: Deutsch-Jozsa (PennyLane)
Grover's Search (Cirq)
code:
import cirq
q0, q1 = cirq.LineQubit.range(2)
circuit = cirq.Circuit()
circuit.append(cirq.H.on_each(q0, q1))
circuit.append(cirq.CZ(q0, q1))
circuit.append(cirq.H.on_each(q0, q1))
circuit.append(cirq.X.on_each(q0, q1))
circuit.append(cirq.CZ(q0, q1))
circuit.append(cirq.X.on_each(q0, q1))
circuit.append(cirq.H.on_each(q0, q1))
circuit.append(cirq.measure(q0, q1, key='result'))

name: Grover's Search (Qiskit)
code:
from qiskit import QuantumCircuit
qc = QuantumCircuit(2, 2)
qc.h([0, 1])
qc.cz(0, 1)
qc.h([0, 1])
qc.x([0, 1])
qc.cz(0, 1)
qc.x([0, 1])
qc.h([0, 1])
qc.measure([0, 1], [0, 1])

name: Grover's Search (PennyLane)
code:
import pennylane as qml
dev = qml.device('default.qubit', wires=2)
@qml.qnode(dev)
def grover():
    qml.Hadamard(wires=0)
    qml.Hadamard(wires=1)
    qml.CZ(wires=[0, 1])
    qml.Hadamard(wires=0)
    qml.Hadamard(wires=1)
    qml.PauliX(wires=0)
    qml.PauliX(wires=1)
    qml.CZ(wires=[0, 1])
    qml.PauliX(wires=0)
    qml.PauliX(wires=1)
    qml.Hadamard(wires=0)
    qml.Hadamard(wires=1)
    return qml.probs(wires=[0, 1])

name: QRNG (Cirq)
code:
import cirq
qubits = cirq.LineQubit.range(4)
circuit = cirq.Circuit()
circuit.append(cirq.H.on_each(*qubits))
circuit.append(cirq.measure(*qubits, key='random_bits'))

XOR Demonstration (PennyLane)
QML XOR Classifier (PennyLane)
VQE (Qiskit)
code:
from qiskit import QuantumCircuit
import numpy as np
theta = np.pi / 4
qc = QuantumCircuit(2, 2)
qc.h(0)
qc.rx(theta, 0)
qc.ry(theta, 1)
qc.cx(0, 1)
qc.measure([0, 1], [0, 1])

name: VQE (PennyLane)
QAOA (Qiskit)
code:
from qiskit import QuantumCircuit
import numpy as np
gamma = np.pi / 4
beta = np.pi / 8
qc = QuantumCircuit(2, 2)
qc.h([0, 1])
qc.cx(0, 1)
qc.rz(2 * gamma, 1)
qc.cx(0, 1)
qc.rx(2 * beta, 0)
qc.rx(2 * beta, 1)
qc.measure([0, 1], [0, 1])

name: Bit-Flip Error Code (Qiskit)
code:
from qiskit import QuantumCircuit
qc = QuantumCircuit(3, 1)
qc.cx(0, 1)
qc.cx(0, 2)
qc.x(0)
qc.cx(0, 1)
qc.cx(0, 2)
qc.ccx(1, 2, 0)
qc.measure(0, 0)

name: Bit-Flip Error Code (Cirq)
code:
import cirq
q0, q1, q2 = cirq.LineQubit.range(3)
circuit = cirq.Circuit()
circuit.append([cirq.CNOT(q0, q1), cirq.CNOT(q0, q2)])
circuit.append(cirq.X(q0))
circuit.append([cirq.CNOT(q0, q1), cirq.CNOT(q0, q2)])
circuit.append(cirq.CCX(q1, q2, q0))
circuit.append(cirq.measure(q0, key='result'))
